title: Spirit Divine, Attend Our Prayers
lines:
Verse 1
Spirit divine, attend our prayers,
  And make this house Thy home;
Descend with all Thy gracious powers,
  O come, Great Spirit, come!

Verse 2
Come as the light; to us reveal
  Our emptiness and woe,
And lead us in those paths of life,
  Where all the righteous go.

Verse 3
Come as the fire, and purge our hearts
  Like sacrificial flame;
Let our whole soul an offering be
  To our Redeemer's name.

Verse 4
Come as the dew, and sweetly bless
  This consecrated hour;
May barrenness rejoice to own
  Thy fertilizing power.

title: Breathe on Me, Breath of God
lines:
Verse 1
Breathe on me, Breath of God,
  Fill me with life anew,
That I may love what Thou dost love,
  And do what Thou wouldst do.

Verse 2
Breathe on me, Breath of God,
  Until my heart is pure,
Until with Thee I will one will,
  To do and to endure.

Verse 3
Breathe on me, Breath of God,
  Till I am wholly Thine,
Until this earthly part of me
  Glows with Thy fire divine.

title: Jerih Moh Yah Mah
lines:
Chorus
Jerih moh Yah mah
  Jerih moh Yah mah
The host of Angels full of joy in heaven,
  The host of Angels, The host of Angels
They are praising God with joyful songs in heaven. Amen

title: All Hail the Power of Jesus' Name
lines:
Verse 1
All hail the power of Jesus' name!
  Let angels prostrate fall;
Bring forth the royal diadem,
  And crown Him Lord of all.

Verse 2
Ye chosen seed of Israel's race,
  Ye ransomed from the fall,
Hail Him who saves you by His grace,
  And crown Him Lord of all.

Verse 3
Let every kindred, every tribe,
  On this terrestrial ball,
To Him all majesty ascribe,
  And crown Him Lord of all.
